title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic GTM Product Manager Jared Sires built CLAFTS (Claude Drafts), an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API that drafts customer replies in a sales rep's own voice. The tool reduces administrative burden by automating email composition and was built with Claude Code by someone with no prior coding experience.
